_note: Controller behaviour: probe sampling cadence, R1/R2 early-stop gate, picker / strategy knobs. Loaded by src/methods/experimental.py at trial start, threaded into the MAPE-K controller bootstrap. The `controller` knobs (port, ready_timeout_s, poll_interval_ms, warmup_n, r1_r2_stop_enabled, orchestrator_poll_every_n, samples_buffer_size) configure the controller process itself; `strategies` (max_attempts, window_size) configure the picker chosen per adaptation.
_note_origin: Thin MAPE-K agent for the target system: M = poll TAS_1 /samples; E = one-shot POST /config to TAS_1 at trial start. A and P are not modelled; the decision is the run's `adp` value.

strategies._note: Honoured by controller.strategies.make_picker; the controller threads these to TAS_1 via POST /config at trial start.
